codeReview.summary: Feature correctly adds Pop to SPEC.md Section 6.5 and Appendix A, aligning with schema.json and validating samples that use Pop. All three sample files pass linting.

issues.description: Embedded JSON schema example in Section 11 still shows backStack enum as ["Push", "Replace", "No", "Modal"] — missing Pop. Prose sections 6.5 and Appendix A correctly include Pop. This is a documentation inconsistency but outside the scope of VAL-SPEC-002 which only checks Section 6.5 and Appendix A.
Error 10 (Invalid Back-Stack Behavior) lists only 4 values: Push, Replace, No, Modal. Missing Pop. This is a secondary doc inconsistency, not flagged by validation contract.

sharedStateObservations.observation: AGENTS.md Error 10 lists back-stack values as 'Push, Replace, No, Modal' (4 values) but SPEC.md Section 6.5 and Appendix A now list 5 values including Pop. AGENTS.md was not updated by this feature and remains inconsistent with the current SPEC.
sharedStateObservations.evidence: AGENTS.md line 363 vs SPEC.md Section 6.5 and Appendix A

summary: PASS — Feature correctly implements Option A: added Pop to SPEC.md Section 6.5 and Appendix A with description ('Current screen removed from back stack; returns to previous screen'), added v1.1 changelog note. Aligns with schema.json (already had Pop) and validates all 3 samples (kanban, cli-dashboard, mobile-onboarding) that use Pop. Secondary issue: embedded JSON schema example in SPEC.md Section 11 and AGENTS.md Error 10 still show 4 values — documentation inconsistencies outside the validation contract scope.
